description: Logs de eventos operacionales (vistas, clics, búsquedas, carritos abandonados). TTL 90 días.

event_type.description: Tipo de evento. Dominio cerrado de 9 valores.

metadata.description: Metadatos variables según event_type (source, position, search_query, quantity, etc.)

ttl_expire.description: Fecha de expiración para TTL index (90 días tras timestamp)

indexes.description: Filtro por tipo de evento + rango temporal
TTL: borrado automático a los 90 días

indexes.name: idx_esr_type_time_session
indexes.description: ESR: E=event_type (equality filter by event type), S=timestamp -1 (sort by most recent first), R=session_id (equality scan for session-based grouping). Query: find recent events of type X grouped by session.

indexes.name: idx_partial_product_view
indexes.description: Partial: only indexes product_view events. Serves analytics queries: 'product views by customer over time'. Drastically reduces index size vs full event_logs index.
